market_pulse: All major competitors actively engaging weekend audiences with talent announcements and themed nights; LIV maintains strong presence with Kehlani/Gorgon City/Four Color Zack residencies and David Guetta headliners.

content_gaps.description: Hip-hop/R&B themed nights (R&Bae Wednesdays) gaining traction at Hakkasan with dedicated content strategy
content_gaps.suggested_action: Consider LIV hip-hop themed night or mixed format residency to capture this demo

content_gaps.description: Beach/dayclub outfit styling and GRWM videos dominating competitor feeds; minimal LIV Beach styling content detected
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch LIV Beach styling campaign with micro-influencers; target 5-10 outfit reels/week

content_gaps.description: Guest list and VIP table booking hashtags with dedicated promoter accounts (#LIVLVGuestlist) active but opportunity for more partner influencer seeding
content_gaps.suggested_action: Expand guest list promoter network by 3-5 additional accounts with 10k+ followers

venues.summary: Strong weekend residency lineup active; Kehlani, Gorgon City, Four Color Zack confirmed for June 19-21; David Guetta exclusive partnership announced

raw_posts.content_summary: Weekend residency announcement: Kehlani (FRI June 19), Gorgon City (SAT June 20), Four Color Zack (SUN June 21). Located inside Fontainebleau.
David Guetta confirmed as exclusive 2025-2026 bi-coastal North American headliner for both LIV Nightclub and LIV Beach; partnership with Fontainebleau announced.
User-generated content showing John Summit performances and Apres Beach party success; positive attendee feedback on residency quality.
Guest list availability and VIP table reservations active; promoter (@livlvguestlist) managing distribution with free entry for women 10PM-1AM.

venues.summary: Dayclub residency confirmed with top talent; Sommer Ray, Tiësto, Kromi June 19-21; strong EDC Week positioning with David Guetta headliner

raw_posts.content_summary: Dayclub residency announced: Sommer Ray (FRI June 19), Tiësto (SAT June 20), Kromi Music (SUN June 21). All-day oasis experience at Fontainebleau.
David Guetta performance at LIV Beach during EDC Week (May 16) generated viral engagement; user-generated content shows high energy and crowd reactions.
Dayclub hours 11AM-3PM confirmed; guest list and cabana reservations active via promoters; free entry for women with drink tickets.

venues.summary: Competitive activity moderate; recent talent bookings (Kaskade, The Chainsmokers in June); strong Instagram presence but limited recent viral content

User outfit guides and dress code TikToks for XS; Jeff Bezos party story generated buzz but dated (from earlier 2026).
